gold.title: Smooth Dropdown
gold.reason: Spring-animated dropdown with explicit smooth transitions — exactly the premium animated feel that differentiates redesigned sites from template clones.

gold.title: 3D Interactive Navbar
gold.reason: Three.js + Framer Motion 3D navbar with dropdown — extraordinarily unique and visually impressive, ideal for high-impact hero sections on portfolio/agency sites.

gold.title: Shifting Dropdown
gold.reason: Animated shifting/morphing dropdown panel — dynamic panel-shift animation creates a memorable interaction pattern that impresses site visitors.

gold.title: Animated Dropdown
gold.reason: Framer Motion animated dropdown with AnimatePresence — polished entrance/exit transitions from Emerald UI, ready-to-use premium interaction.

gold.title: Dropdown Menu
gold.reason: Framer Motion animated dropdown menu with icon support and smooth AnimatePresence — clean premium dropdown applicable across all navigation use cases.

gold.title: Floating Action Panel
gold.reason: Spring-animated floating action panel with dual mode (actions/note) triggered by DOM position — highly polished, unique contextual dropdown perfect for rich website interactions.

gold.title: Fluid Dropdown
gold.reason: Fluid animated dropdown with smooth transitions — premium feel and visually distinctive design that elevates navigation menus on redesigned sites.

gold.title: Animated Shifting Tab Component
gold.reason: Tab-style animated dropdown/navigation with smooth shifting indicator — polished animated tab pattern highly applicable to site navigation and section switching.

silver.title: Profile Dropdown
silver.reason: User profile dropdown with avatar and action items — clean, commonly needed on any site with user accounts, good design quality.

silver.title: User Dropdown
silver.reason: User account dropdown menu — solid implementation of an essential pattern for authenticated site experiences.

silver.title: User Profile Dropdown
silver.reason: Profile dropdown with user info display — well-designed and practical, good for membership and account-based sites.

silver.title: Filters
silver.reason: Multi-select filter dropdown with command palette and checkboxes — very useful for product/portfolio filtering on customer sites, functional but complex.

silver.title: Menu (React Aria)
silver.reason: Accessible React Aria menu with keyboard support — excellent a11y foundation, clean design, strong for compliance-focused redesigns.

silver.title: Select (React Aria)
silver.reason: Accessible React Aria select component — well-built with good keyboard/screen reader support, practical for form-heavy sites.

silver.title: Dropdown Menu (Origin UI)
silver.reason: Origin UI styled dropdown with custom pointer-down handling — better visual treatment than bare shadcn, solid for most site contexts.

silver.title: Inline Dropdown
silver.reason: Inline/text-embedded dropdown — useful pattern for inline content selection on content-rich pages, clean execution.

silver.title: Combo Box
silver.reason: Searchable combo box dropdown — essential for sites with large option sets, good implementation of a widely-needed pattern.

silver.title: Dropdown 01
silver.reason: Clean styled dropdown variant — functional with good design, usable across various site contexts.

silver.title: Ruixen Menu Options
silver.reason: Styled menu options dropdown — good design quality and clean execution, solid Silver for navigation and option menus.

silver.title: Language Selector Dropdown
silver.reason: Internationalization language picker dropdown — highly practical for multilingual sites, clean and focused implementation.

bronze.title: Dropdown (Ant Design)
bronze.reason: Ant Design library dropdown component — tied to Ant Design's opinionated system, difficult to customize for website redesign aesthetic goals.

bronze.title: Basic Dropdown
bronze.reason: Explicitly 'basic' dropdown — minimal implementation without distinguishing design, meant as a foundation not a finished deliverable.

bronze.title: Theme Dropdown
bronze.reason: Light/dark theme toggle dropdown — single-purpose utility (theme switching) with very limited applicability beyond that one use case.

bronze.title: Assignee User
bronze.reason: Task assignee selector — highly app-specific to project management tools, not useful for general public-facing website redesigns.

bronze.title: Activity Dropdown
bronze.reason: Activity feed/log dropdown — too specific to dashboard/app contexts to be valuable for customer website redesigns.

bronze.title: Select
bronze.reason: Basic select component — minimal styling over a standard select pattern, no distinguishing design or animation.

bronze.title: Activity Dropdown
bronze.reason: Another activity dropdown variant — app-specific and overlapping with other entries, low value for public-facing site redesigns.

bronze.title: Dropdown Menu
bronze.reason: Bare shadcn DropdownMenu primitive — foundational Radix wrapper with no added design value, building block not a showcase component.

bronze.title: Workspaces
bronze.reason: Workspace switcher dropdown — highly specific to multi-tenant SaaS apps, not applicable to customer website redesigns.
